title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Gerd, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Usopp as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: usopp!! Keep your mitts off the Elder's sword!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SHADDUP, DORR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HE,,, anyone wanna try pulling out excalibur?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't! The blood loss will kill him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh my, he's shoooo drunk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look who's talking!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I guess it can't be helped though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This was his dream!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Making it all the way here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WaHaha!! You can tell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Some- thing's off...

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: Where's Gerd-CHAN?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They have bone fractures...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And one of them looks like they've been stabbed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really think a normal human could cause that kind of damage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What happened? Out with it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guards are no jokes!! What are you up to?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nothing! I was merely up there doing research, so I can improve my block castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I found the front door all sliced up, and the guards were-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you hot? You're sweating bullets...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Because you keep staring at me!')

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna question the guards...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No!! They need rest!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, I'm gonna tell Jarul.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But that'll ruin the party for him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't do that till you get all the facts straight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Nobody likes a party pooper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this 10ki business gets out before Luffy-Taso and the others return, I'll be labeled a co-conspirator!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hopefully, Loki just takes off once he's free... He can raise hell overseas for all I care!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing that worries me is that red hair look-a-like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: SPILL IT!! You know something, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GE... hoh!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
